steps.title: Status Bar
evidence: Status bar visible at bottom with fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 h-7 font-mono classes
Shows 'No session selected' in muted text when no session selected (browser verified)
Background color changes: blue (running), amber (waiting), red (error/aborted) — code verified at status-bar.tsx:81-96
All items clickable: model picker, permission cycle, kata status popover — code verified
Included in authenticated-layout.tsx as <StatusBar /> fixed at bottom
Height is h-7 (28px), uses monospace font

steps.title: Settings & Defaults
evidence: Settings page has Account, Defaults, Notifications, Appearance sections (browser verified)
Defaults section includes: Permission Mode (6 radio options), Model dropdown, Max Budget, Thinking Mode, Effort (browser verified)
user_preferences table created via migration v6 in project-registry-migrations.ts
GET/PUT /api/preferences routes exist in api/index.ts:221-234
useUserDefaults() hook at hooks/use-user-defaults.ts with localStorage caching and server sync

steps.title: Zero-Friction New Session
evidence: QuickPromptInput component at components/quick-prompt-input.tsx with centered heading 'What should the agent do?'
Config chips for project and model visible and clickable (browser verified — saw 'baseplane' and 'claude-opus-4-6' buttons)
Type prompt + Enter starts session via onSubmit handler
Replaces empty state in AgentOrchPage.tsx:227-240 — shows QuickPromptInput when no session selected

steps.title: Chat-List Sidebar
evidence: Sessions show colored status dots: green=running, yellow=waiting, red=error, blue pulse=spawning, grey outline=idle (code verified at SessionListItem.tsx:52-72)
Preview text shown (session prompt), time-ago format (e.g. '23h ago', '1d ago', '9d ago') — browser verified
Turns and cost shown as secondary text (browser verified)
Right-click context menu with Rename, Tag, Fork, Archive options (code verified at lines 141-158, browser saw 'Session options' triggers)

steps.title: Command Palette
evidence: CommandMenu component at components/command-menu.tsx with sections: Recent Sessions, Projects, Actions, Navigation, Theme
Ctrl+K binding in context/search-provider.tsx:18-27
Fuzzy search via cmdk CommandInput over sessions, projects, navigation items
Session results include status, project, time-ago; Project results include branch and dirty flag
Command Palette heading visible in DOM (browser verified)

steps.title: Bug Fixes
evidence: ResultEvent handler at session-do.ts:659 sets status to 'idle' (not 'completed') for is_error:false
SessionStatus type at shared-types/index.ts:407-415 does NOT include 'completed'
No remaining references to 'completed' status in orchestrator source
All notification URLs use /?session=${id} format (verified at lines 609, 640, 678, 693, 720)
/session/{id} route redirects to /?session={id} — browser verified: navigated to /session/test-session-id, URL became /?session=test-session-id

steps.title: Workspaces
evidence: WorkspaceSelector component at components/workspace-selector.tsx with groupProjectsIntoWorkspaces() logic
Groups projects by repo_origin field — auto-detects workspace name from git remote URL
Workspace selector dropdown shows 'All' + grouped workspaces (browser verified: 'All Workspaces 12 projects' button, dropdown with 'All' and 'Ungrouped 12')
repo_origin added to ProjectInfo type in shared-types/index.ts:348
workspace_preferences table + API routes in project-registry.ts

steps.title: Notification Actions
evidence: Service worker handles notification click actions at sw.ts:23-49: approve/deny POSTs to tool-approval endpoint, new-session opens dashboard, default opens session URL
Push notification payloads include actions: ask_user sends 'open', permission_request sends 'approve'+'deny', completion sends 'open'+'new-session' (session-do.ts:612, 644-647, 681-684)
showNotification passes actions array at sw.ts:13-20

steps.title: Agent Tabs
evidence: TabBar component at components/tab-bar.tsx with session tabs and close buttons
Tab visible in browser: saw '12f633610379 Close tab' button in accessibility tree after selecting a session
Keyboard shortcuts at AgentOrchPage.tsx:170-204: Cmd+T adds tab, Cmd+W closes, Cmd+1-9 switches
localStorage persistence via stores/tabs.ts with loadTabs/saveTabs functions
Wired into AgentOrchPage.tsx:226 as <TabBar onSelectSession={handleSelectSession} />

steps.title: Mobile Gestures
evidence: INITIAL: Missing — no touch event handlers existed in SessionListItem.tsx
FIX APPLIED: Added swipe-left, long-press, and scroll deadzone handlers
Swipe-left: 80px threshold, translateX transform reveals archive button (red bg-destructive)
Long-press: 500ms timer opens context menu, cancelled on >10px movement
Scroll deadzone: gesture decided on first 10px — vertical > horizontal aborts swipe, lets scroll happen
Typecheck passes clean after fix
